TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kalahaay, title = Kalahaay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalahaay} }

S.FORM: alang Kalahaay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 738 buwan, 2,154 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 316 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 1,838 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Paywan 0.4%, Puyuma 0.4%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kalahaay hya' ga Cirarokohay. tay 'zil na Kalahaay hya' ga Madawdaw. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kalahaay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kalahaay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 738 buwan, 2,154 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 316 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 1,838 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Paywan 0.4%, Puyuma 0.4%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kalahaay hya' ga Cirarokohay. tay 'zil na Kalahaay hya' ga Madawdaw. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kalahaay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kalańßaaj …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ¶~ ®inkoŇč s~…ēoŇč, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, pajwan *.*%, pujuma *.*%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *.*%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na kalańßaaj ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®irarokońßaj. taj Ēzil na kalańßaaj ńßja Ē …£a ma*aw*aw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč kalańßaaj …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
